title: PostHog
classification: reference/explanation (Systems Architecture › Technology Stack) — no formal requirement IDs or MUST-mandated build obligations on this page itself; the actual build requirements live in and are covered by FR-CT-UBA-1..12 / NFR-CT-UBA-1..5 (PRD Addendum: User-Behavior Analytics, page TYWAtnvliD, linked from this page as "the full design") and the orvex-studio-console feature map (User-Behavior Analytics pane, 8 stories: analytics BFF, authz/credential confinement, session-replay embed, web/marketing analytics embed, privacy/erasure fronting)
